name: Spain
style_of_play: Positional possession with high line, coordinated pressing, and intricate passing combinations.
weaknesses: can lack verticality against compact blocks
high line risk on direct balls in behind
tactical_summary: Maintain a high defensive line and circulate the ball to draw opponents out, then penetrate through third-man runs and half-space combinations. Immediate counter-press after losses.
why_it_matters: Spain's control of tempo can neutralize transition teams by limiting their opportunities to break forward.
injury_news: Placeholder — injury updates pending live data source.
